findings.description: Section s3 has no corresponding source content. The `++++++++++++++++++++++++` line in the RST source between the intro and the '業務アクションハンドラの実装' heading is a decorative visual separator, not a real content section. s3 content is 'なし' (3 characters), well below the 50-character threshold. The source has 3 natural sections (intro + 2 h2), but the knowledge file has 4 sections.
findings.source_evidence: The `++++++++++++++++++++++++` line appears between the introductory content and the `------------------------------------------業務アクションハンドラの実装------------------------------------------` heading. It has no associated text and functions as a horizontal rule, not a section heading.

findings.description: s1 hints are missing `DataReadHandler`, which is explicitly referenced in s1 content (point 4: 閉局時の挙動が異なる — `:doc:`../handler/DataReadHandler` の上位に :doc:`../handler/ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandler` を配置し`).
findings.source_evidence: Source point 4: ':doc:`../handler/DataReadHandler` の上位に :doc:`../handler/ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandler` を配置し、閉局中はメッセージキュー上の受信電文は取得せずに滞留させ'

findings.description: s4 hints are missing several PascalCase handler names that appear in the standard handler queue list and processing flow details within the section content: StatusCodeConvertHandler, GlobalErrorHandler, ThreadContextClearHandler, ThreadContextHandler_main, ThreadContextHandler_request, MultiThreadExecutionHandler, RequestPathJavaPackageMapping.
findings.source_evidence: Source HandlerQueue array: ['Main', 'StatusCodeConvertHandler', 'GlobalErrorHandler', 'ThreadContextClearHandler', 'ThreadContextHandler_main', 'DuplicateProcessCheckHandler', 'RequestPathJavaPackageMapping', 'MultiThreadExecutionHandler', ...]. These all appear in the knowledge file's s4 content under '標準ハンドラ構成' and flow details, but are absent from the hints array.
